---
title: "About"
image: marlininfield.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: spotify
      text: Playlist
      href: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4geESJMhY9kUPZyI3AfAQq?si=TN0rwLWlTwm3byuMcQkwIA
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/marlin-alejandro-merchán-58b564392
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

This blog is meant to document my writing and inner thoughts

Wellesley College \| Wellesley, MA

B.A. in Biology & English \| May 2026
